positive: A whimsical and minimalist depiction of a group of celestial animals (a fox, a doe, a raven, and a bear) standing together in a stylized, forest glen. The style should be inspired by Japanese woodblock prints mixed with modern graphic design, featuring clean, bold silhouettes and deep indigo and forest green color palettes accented by gold leaf highlights. The composition must be central, balanced, and suitable for repeating apparel patterns. Strong contrasts and defined edges are essential. Include elements like stylized constellations visible in the background and delicate floral motifs framing the animals. The overall mood should be magical, peaceful, and adventurous. Designed for high-contrast screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, low contrast, blurry, noisy, text, signature, watermark, ugly, bad anatomy, deformed, extra limbs, out of frame, messy, clutter, logo, trademark, celebrity
